_comment: PER-PROJECT. /setup fills each command below, or sets "" to skip that gate. Single source of truth for the local hooks AND the CI workflow.
format: <<<FILL: format command (auto-fix), or empty string to skip>>>
lint: <<<FILL: lint command, or empty string to skip>>>
typecheck: <<<FILL: typecheck command, or empty string to skip>>>
test: <<<FILL: test command, or empty string to skip>>>
build: <<<FILL: build command, or empty string to skip>>>
